/usr/bin/c++  -Wall CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/ClientConn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/ClientLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/FileHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/HandlerFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/HandlerRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/HeartBeatHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/JsonHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/main_client.cpp.o -o ../bin/client  libhttpserver_lib.a -lpthread -lhiredis
